name: JR Review
description: Fresh review work unit for a JR task or feature branch.

fields.name: target_ref
fields.description: Task id, feature id, branch, commit range, or PR

steps.name: diff
steps.prompt:
Inspect the JR review target `{{ target_ref }}`.

Gather the relevant diff, task/feature notes, acceptance criteria, tests, and prior review comments. Do not edit code in this step. Write review context to `.tickets/jr/reviews/{{ id }}.md`.

steps.name: quality
steps.prompt:
Review quality for `{{ target_ref }}`.

Check correctness, missing tests, scope creep, architectural fit, compatibility, error handling, docs, and likely regressions. Focus especially on: {{ review_focus }}. Add findings to `.tickets/jr/reviews/{{ id }}.md`.

steps.name: decision
steps.prompt:
Make a clear JR review decision for `{{ target_ref }}`.

Write one of: `approved`, `changes-requested`, or `escalate`. For requested changes, provide precise file-level tasks. For escalation, explain what a human or architect must decide.

on_reject.prompt:
The review decision was not clear enough: {{ rejection_reason }}

Re-read the target and produce a sharper decision.

steps.name: handoff
steps.prompt:
Write the review handoff.

Update `.tickets/jr/reviews/{{ id }}.md` with the final decision, required next tickets if any, suggested assignee role, and exact validation to rerun after fixes.
